previousFailures: TITLE_RENDERS (stars not initialized before first frame — fixed)

criticalTests.detail: Canvas present, script loaded, no JS errors
state=TITLE, 60 stars initialized, particles array ready
graceTimer=90 frames, player bobs at y=300, velY=0 during grace
First wall at x=430, gapH=233 (39% screen), gapY=214 — reachable
score incremented to 1 when wall passed player x position
handleInput() on DEAD → state=PLAY, full re-init

warnings.detail: preview_screenshot times out on canvas games with 60fps requestAnimationFrame loops. All functional tests passed via eval. Workaround: QA agent should call cancelAnimationFrame + draw() before screenshotting — but even paused loop caused timeout. This is a tooling limitation, not a game bug.
warnings.fix: Future canvas games: expose a window.pauseLoop() helper for QA screenshots

warnings.detail: bestScore=3 found in localStorage key 'gf_best' — persists correctly
speedLevel increments every 8 walls passed, scrollSpeed increases correctly

screenshots.title: UNAVAILABLE — canvas 60fps loop causes screenshot tool timeout. Visually confirmed in earlier session: glowing cyan GRAVITY FLIPPER title, 60 white stars, TAP/SPACE TO START in amber, cyan diamond player preview.
screenshots.gameplay: UNAVAILABLE — confirmed via eval: player at x=80 y=300, wall at x=430 with 233px gap, scrolling at 2.5px/frame
screenshots.gameover: UNAVAILABLE — confirmed via eval: state correctly transitions to DEAD on boundary collision

knownIssue.fix: Add window.pauseLoop / window.resumeLoop to all future canvas games for QA compatibility

shipRecommendation: SHIP — all 10 critical tests passed. One tooling warning (screenshot capture) does not affect gameplay. Game is CrazyGames-ready.
